name: Symptoms showed up weeks after site fall in Ogden—too late?
description: Report now + medical proof—no, not too late.[4]

mainEntity.name: Symptoms showed up weeks after site fall in Ogden—too late?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report now + medical proof—no, not too late.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, report ASAP; delayed injuries covered if linked.** Utah comp accepts medical proof of causation.[4] Key factors: (1) See doctor for records; (2) insurers question delays; (3) 4-year suit limit; (4) experts testify nexus.[5][2] Document timeline, get scans, lawyer counters 'unrelated' claims. Most delayed claims succeed.
